title: helichrysum marifolium
intro: Helichrysum marifolium, also known as annual curry plant, is a flowering plant belonging to the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against infections and oxidative stress. The health benefits of Helichrysum marifolium include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and even help to alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Helichrysum marifolium are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
